evals.prompt: IMPORTANT: This repo is a fork at dh-sandbox/flask. When creating the PR, use: gh pr create --repo dh-sandbox/flask --head qlty-coverage-integration --base main
evals.expected_output: PR created with pytest-cov coverage generation and Qlty upload step. Uses token auth (public repo). Only runs coverage on one matrix entry, not all Python versions.
expectations: Created a PR on dh-sandbox/flask
Used qltysh/qlty-action/coverage@v2 for upload
Used token auth (not OIDC) because the repo is public
Added pytest-cov for coverage generation
Coverage output format is Cobertura XML or LCOV
Only generates coverage on a single matrix entry, not all Python versions
Did not remove existing CI jobs or test configurations
CI test jobs pass on the PR
Coverage upload step shows actual coverage data in logs (not 0 lines)

evals.prompt: IMPORTANT: This repo is a fork at dh-sandbox/cobra. When creating the PR, use: gh pr create --repo dh-sandbox/cobra --head qlty-coverage-integration --base main
evals.expected_output: PR created with Go coverage profile generation and Qlty upload. Uses native Go cover format (not Cobertura conversion). Single matrix entry upload.
expectations: Created a PR on dh-sandbox/cobra
Used qltysh/qlty-action/coverage@v2 for upload
Used go test -coverprofile for coverage generation
Uploads Go cover profile directly (not unnecessary Cobertura conversion)
Only generates coverage on a single matrix entry
CI test jobs pass on the PR
Coverage upload step shows actual coverage data in logs

evals.prompt: IMPORTANT: This repo is a fork at dh-sandbox/pip-tools. When creating the PR, use: gh pr create --repo dh-sandbox/pip-tools --head qlty-coverage-integration --base main
evals.expected_output: PR created with coverage uploads using server-side merging (incomplete/complete) since the test suite uses a large matrix strategy.
expectations: Created a PR on dh-sandbox/pip-tools
Used qltysh/qlty-action/coverage@v2 for upload
Used incomplete: true on upload steps for server-side merging
Used command: complete (NOT complete: true) in a final job
Did not remove existing Codecov integration
CI test jobs pass on the PR

evals.prompt: IMPORTANT: This repo is a fork at dh-sandbox/flagsmith. When creating the PR, use: gh pr create --repo dh-sandbox/flagsmith --head qlty-coverage-integration --base main
evals.expected_output: PR created with coverage tags for the Python backend and TypeScript frontend services. Uses tags (not merging) since this is a monorepo with independent services.
expectations: Created a PR on dh-sandbox/flagsmith
Used qltysh/qlty-action/coverage@v2 for upload
Used coverage tags (tag: parameter) for separate services
Did NOT use incomplete/complete merging
Modified both backend (Python) and frontend (TypeScript) workflow files
Added coverage generation for both Python (pytest-cov or similar) and TypeScript (Jest --coverage)
CI test jobs pass on the PR

evals.prompt: IMPORTANT: This repo is a fork at dh-sandbox/phpstan. When creating the PR, use: gh pr create --repo dh-sandbox/phpstan --head qlty-coverage-integration --base main
evals.expected_output: The skill should detect that this is a distribution repo with no instrumentable source code and stop, explaining that coverage should be set up in phpstan-src instead.
expectations: Detected that this is a distribution/wrapper repo with no meaningful source code
Did NOT set up coverage on the e2e tests
Reported that coverage is not applicable for this repo
Suggested that coverage should be set up in the upstream source repo (phpstan-src) instead
